title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules and six moves for successfully building projects with Claude Code, based on Y Combinator leadership principles. The framework includes a four-question test for project validation and targets founders and startup builders learning to lead with AI tools.
